description: An out-of-bounds read vulnerability exists in V8's script line-end computation for externalized strings. If an attacker corrupts the length field of an externalized string, `Script::GetPositionInfo` and `Script::InitLineEndsInternal` in `src/objects/script.cc` eventually call `String::CalculateLineEnds` in `src/objects/string.cc`. `CalculateLineEndsImpl` then trusts the corrupted string length and iterates past the real backing buffer, producing an out-of-bounds read when `console.profile()` triggers script position logging.

fixes.description: Upstream fix patch exported from commit 64d557999055da1faa080b97864b7fbb5e225953 for final fixed-image validation.
